params.name: Exquisite Pipa
params.description:
On Aug 22, 734 AD, Emperor Shomu received this Exquisite Pipa as a tribute from Japanese envoys returning from Tang China.
This pipa was the imperial property of Emperor Shomu and was greatly loved by him. It is 32 inches long and about nine inches wide at the belly, made entirely of rosewood, with bird, butterfly, flower, and cloud patterns and auspicious seashell patterns. Between the flower and leaf hearts, there are red and blue powder colors, gold-lined edges, and decorated with precious …
